values.description: Exploratory protocol with no compatibility promise.
Governed protocol with initial compatibility policy and incomplete stable proof.
Stable protocol with compatibility range, fixtures, proof, and refusal behavior.
Protocol remains recognized but should not be used for new surfaces.
Protocol is no longer active and must refuse or migrate through explicit policy.
Protocol description is generated and must declare source before promotion.
Protocol description exists only for test fixtures.
Protocol description is retained for archive or audit context only.
